name: bold
description: Athletic performance energy with gym intensity, power ingredients spotlighted, and the bold confidence of peak physical health. This mood speaks to the performance-driven consumer who wants supplements that fuel real results.

style.lighting: dramatic gym lighting | hard directional sport light | sweat-glistening rim light
style.color_grade: high contrast green and black | gold power accents | deep shadow athletic
style.camera: low angle power shot | dynamic action freeze | dramatic product close-up
style.composition: athlete-product pairing | power ingredient hero | intensity-first framing
style.props: protein shaker, gym equipment, sweat towel, resistance bands, supplement tub, weight plates

copy_tone: Powerful and direct. Performance-driven language with science backing. 'Fuel your peak.' Uses metrics and results language. Confident without making miracle claims. Honest strength.

music.mood: driving workout beats, power electronic, motivational bass

example_prompt_fragment: A dramatic gym scene with a GAIA Supplements protein tub in forest green and gold positioned on a weight bench, dramatic directional lighting creating strong shadows, an athlete mid-workout in soft focus background, sweat glistening with rim light, high contrast green and black color grade with gold accents, bold athletic supplement photography
